text: Alabama jail staff didn’t help when she went into labor — other inmates did, lawsuit says - NBC News
fullText: In a state with a long history of arresting pregnant women, one mom in custody says she was left to fend for herself.

text: 10,000 rulings: The courts’ overwhelming rebuke of Trump’s ICE policies - Politico
fullText: A POLITICO analysis reveals judges have ruled against ICE detention practices in roughly 90 percent of cases since the agency mandated that millions of immigrants must be locked up while they face deportation proceedings.

text: Ja Morant pays emotional tribute to Brandon Clarke after Memphis Grizzlies star dies aged 29 - talkSPORT
fullText: Memphis Grizzlies forward Brandon Clarke has passed away at eh age of 29

text: SoftBank posts $46 billion gain at Vision Fund driven mainly by massive OpenAI bet - CNBC
fullText: SoftBank booked a yearly gain of $46 billion at its Vision Fund driven in large part by the huge rise in value of its investment in OpenAI.

text: Horoscope for Wednesday, May 13, 2026 - Chicago Sun-Times

text: Sons of Kouri Richins, author convicted of murdering husband, say they'd feel unsafe if she wasn't in prison - CBS News
fullText: Prosecutors said Kouri Richins laced her husband's cocktail with five times the lethal dose of fentanyl in 2022.

text: Jason Collins, a gay trailblazer in the NBA, dies of brain cancer at 47 - The Washington Post
fullText: He was the first active, openly gay player in the league’s history. In December, he announced that he had a deadly form of brain cancer.

text: Sony’s new Xperia phone gets an overdue redesign - The Verge
fullText: The Sony Xperia 1 VIII gets a new look with a refreshed square camera module, but still no US release.

text: South Carolina Republicans block plan to eliminate Clyburn’s House seat - The Washington Post
fullText: Rep. James E. Clyburn has long been a power broker in the Democratic Party. A state Senate leader had warned that a new map could backfire for the GOP.

text: Who could challenge Keir Starmer as prime minister? - BBC

text: Hayden Panettiere's ex reacts to domestic abuse claims in her memoir - Entertainment Weekly

text: FBI Director Kash Patel denies drinking allegations in heated Senate exchange - AP News
fullText: FBI Director Kash Patel has strongly denied allegations of excessive drinking on the job. The accusations came up during a budget hearing on Tuesday. Democratic Sen. Chris Van Hollen confronted Patel about a recent article in The Atlantic magazine critical of…

text: Elon Musk Had ‘Hair-Raising’ Idea of Passing OpenAI On to His Kids, Sam Altman Says - WIRED
